a:r.a:t: Financial benchmarking — Methodology and sample set
The peer group includes a total of [
] companies that are presented in more detail on the following pages.
In order to improve the comparability of the data presented, the information reported in this section is based on statutory accounts with potential exceptional items included within EBITDA.
The demographics of companies considered have been provided on this slide.
Identify companies with similar operations, net sales level and geography as Target.
Identify a set of key performance indicators (KPI) for the industry of the Target.
Compare the Target’s data with industry benchmarks.
